meta_title: For Founders: deployment workflow to Solve no coding experience (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to deployment workflow and overcome no coding experience. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Founders: Deploy SaaS Without Coding (Antigravity & Claude)
content.seo_description: Master a professional deployment workflow to bypass coding barriers. Learn how to launch your MVP using Antigravity and Claude Code as a non-technical founder.
content.answer_block: You don't need to be a developer to launch a SaaS. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative deployment, you can bypass manual coding. This workflow automates infrastructure, testing, and production pushes, allowing you to focus entirely on product validation and revenue generation.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is paved with good intentions and unfinished codebases. As a founder, the 'no-code' trap is real: you either spend months learning syntax that becomes obsolete, or you bleed cash hiring developers who don't understand your vision. You aren't building a codebase; you are building a business that solves a painful problem.

The secret isn't learning to code—it's mastering the deployment workflow. By treating your AI agents as your lead engineering team, you can ship production-grade software in days rather than months. This is the era of the 'Architect Founder,' where your primary skill is not C++ or Python, but system orchestration.

steps.title: Define the Business Logic Architecture
steps.description: Before touching the terminal, map your SaaS features to a structured schema. This prevents 'hallucination drift' in your AI agents.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Generate a project architecture for a SaaS MVP that includes user authentication, a Stripe integration for payments, and a PostgreSQL database. Output the directory structure.

steps.title: Automate Database Schema Deployment
steps.description: Use your AI agents to write the migrations so you never have to manually touch SQL files.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a migration script for a user profile table and a subscription status column. Ensure the schema is optimized for Supabase/PostgreSQL.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx prisma migrate dev --name init_db'

steps.title: Hook Up the Payment Gateway
steps.description: Monetization is your first priority. We use AI to integrate Stripe securely without manual SDK debugging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Stripe checkout session endpoint using Node.js and Express. Include logic to handle successful payment webhooks.

steps.title: Configure the CI/CD Pipeline
steps.description: Establish a deployment workflow where every push to 'main' triggers a production build, ensuring zero manual downtime.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a GitHub Actions YAML file that runs tests and deploys to Vercel upon a merge to the main branch.

steps.title: Final Production Smoke Test
steps.description: Perform a final validation of your production environment to ensure your MVP is ready for real users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a QA engineer. Review the current codebase and suggest a suite of end-to-end tests for the user sign-up flow.

pro_tips: Always force your AI agents to write a 'README.md' file first; it acts as the source of truth for the project's state.
Use environment variables (.env) for every secret key; never hardcode credentials, even in testing.
Implement 'feature flags' early so you can toggle features off if the production environment hits a bottleneck.
Request 'modular code' from your agents to ensure that if one part fails, the entire application doesn't crash.
Review the AI's generated code periodically for 'dependency bloat' to keep your deployment speeds lightning fast.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, focus on your first 10 paying customers. Use the feedback loop from their usage to prompt Antigravity for your next feature iteration.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt dictate your roadmap. You have the tools, the workflow, and the vision to launch a high-revenue SaaS product today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
